description: Complete the next MVP operator slice by adding explicit approval rejection handling, command-driven operator actions, richer TUI state projection, and integration coverage for the approval decision loop.

userStories.title: Persist rejected approval decisions
userStories.description: As a developer, I want approval storage and task-service APIs to support rejected approvals so that the MVP can record operator rejection as a first-class state change.
acceptanceCriteria: ApprovalRepository exposes markRejected(approvalId) and persists status 'rejected'
TaskService exposes markRejected(approvalId) for both in-memory and repository-backed modes
Store and task-service tests cover pending to rejected transitions
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add explicit rejection handling in the app loop
userStories.description: As an operator, I want the app loop to handle rejected approvals explicitly so that a risky action can be rejected without running the tool and the thread ends in a clear failed state.
acceptanceCriteria: createApplication exposes an explicit rejection path for a stored approval
Rejecting an approval does not call tools.run for the stored action
Rejecting an approval appends an approval.rejected event and marks the thread failed
Rejecting an approval sends a final operator-facing reply that includes the rejection outcome
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add reusable CLI commands for message, approve, and reject
userStories.description: As a local operator, I want the CLI to support message, approve, and reject commands so that I can drive the MVP flow without relying on the current hardcoded smoke script.
acceptanceCriteria: CLI supports a message command that submits an admin message through the composed app path
CLI supports an approve <approvalId> command that resumes the stored action and prints the final thread status
CLI supports a reject <approvalId> command that records rejection and prints the failed thread status without running the tool
CLI tests cover command parsing and the approve/reject execution path
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Project approval decisions and failures into the TUI view model
userStories.description: As an operator, I want the TUI state model to surface approval decisions and failure summaries so that I can see rejected work and its reason without reading raw storage records.
acceptanceCriteria: Approval queue items include approval status in the projected view-model shape
Thread display data includes the latest rejection or failure summary when present
Main screen event projection includes approval.rejected and thread.failed summaries
TUI projection tests cover rejected and failed thread state
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Verify the approval decision loop across SQLite-backed composition
userStories.description: As a developer, I want entrypoint-level integration coverage for both approval and rejection flows so that the persisted operator decision loop is proven end to end.
acceptanceCriteria: Entrypoint coverage proves message to approval to approve flow with persisted SQLite state
Entrypoint coverage proves message to approval to reject flow with persisted SQLite state
Focused integration coverage stays limited to the operator decision lifecycle
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
